column1: # NOTE: Iterations 0-16 measured with zero-slot SSTORE bug (inflated by ~22k gas).
# Deltas between iterations are still accurate. Absolute values are shifted.
# Test fixed at commit 23fe43c42 — ring buffer now wraps around (nonzero→nonzero SSTORE).

column7: description
corrected baseline — steady-state ring buffer SSTORE
merge two initial assembly blocks — compiler handles separate blocks better
skip ProposeInput struct in fast path — decode calldataWord directly
single-operator fast path in checkProposer — activation check adds more cost
pass blob values as stack variables — stack too deep
flat ProposedFast event — test framework cant decode new event
flat ProposedFast event — saves 1924 gas (guard: test infra event decode issues)
inline single-operator path in checkProposer — skip epoch computation
LOG1 instead of LOG3 — loses indexed fields for minimal savings
minimize ProposedFast event — drop derivable parentHash and endOfSubmissionWindow
combined _enterReentryLock — only 24 gas, too invasive (changes EssentialContract)
checkProposerMinimal — skip bytes param in STATICCALL (36 vs 100 bytes calldata)
pack ProposedFast event data — 4 words to 2 words (LOG3 0x80→0x40)
LOG2 instead of LOG3 — proposer derivable from tx sender
tight hash encoding — 11 words vs 18. Protocol change for marginal savings
cache blob values in Yul variables — stack too deep
cache blob + inline pbn/cleared/newValue — Yul compiler already optimizes MLOADs
LOG1 instead of LOG2 — drop indexed id (sequential, derivable by indexers)
move assembly STATICCALL to base _checkProposer — compiler already inlines virtual dispatch
write hash buffer at 0x00 — reduce peak memory + avoid add(ptr,...) overhead
merge deadline + coreState assembly blocks — compiler prefers separate blocks
via-ir pipeline — legacy codegen handles hand-optimized assembly better
